seoTitle: Farnsfield vs Fassifern — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Farnsfield and Fassifern. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Farnsfield and Fassifern.
heading: Farnsfield vs Fassifern — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Farnsfield, Queensland and Fassifern, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Farnsfield has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Fassifern (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Farnsfield or Fassifern safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Farnsfield has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Fassifern scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Farnsfield scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Fassifern scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Farnsfield or Fassifern?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Farnsfield has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
